# Agent Guides

This folder contains agent-specific operating notes for the runtime ingestion agents implemented under `src/smart_ingestion/agents/`.

Layout:

- `.github/agents/<agent_id>/agent.md`
- `.github/agents/<agent_id>/skills.md`

Covered agents:

- `csv_to_sqlite`
- `csv_to_postgresql`
- `csv_to_s3`
- `s3_to_sqlite`
- `json_to_sqlite`
- `rest_to_json`
- `csv_to_csv`
- `stream_json_to_parquet`
- `stream_json_to_json`
